statement: Classification reaches the `NFR-001` bar (≥ 85% top-1 category) on the labeled corpus, **and** a confidence threshold exists that isolates a low-risk subset safe enough to auto-send (≤ X% error, X agreed pre-run).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "HYP-001", "Hypothesis": "Classification reaches the `NFR-001` bar (≥ 85% top-1 category) on the labeled corpus, **and** a confidence threshold exists that isolates a low-risk subset safe enough to auto-send (≤ X% error, X agreed pre-run).", "Confirms-if (signal)": "Accuracy ≥ 85% and a threshold yields a whitelisted low-risk subset at ≤ X% measured error.", "Refutes-if": "Accuracy < 85%, or no threshold produces a sufficiently low-error low-risk subset.", "Experiment": "`EXP-001`", "Status": "Open"}}

title: Retrieval supplies grounding for a useful share of routine emails, so the deferral rate is low enough to deliver real deflection (`KPI-001`).
statement: Retrieval supplies grounding for a useful share of routine emails, so the deferral rate is low enough to deliver real deflection (`KPI-001`).
